chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1511 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.6009/2022 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 17.01.2023 Mr. Muhammad Qayyum Arain, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Sarfraz Magsi, Advocate for respondents No.8 & 12. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- A.S.I. Shahzado, Investigation Officer of Police Station Saeedabad, District Matiari is present and files copy of statement of petitioner No.1 recorded under Section 161, Cr.P.C, which is taken on record. As per statement of petitioner No.1, she earlier married with one Muhammad Waseem son of Mureed Khan and after pronouncing of talaqs she contracted second marriage with petitioner No.2. Investigation Officer states that he will make this statement part of the final challan/report under Section 173, Cr.P.C. and shall submit the same before the Judicial Magistrate concerned for obtaining orders in accordance with law. Learned Counsel for the petitioners, on being satisfied with the statement of Investigation Officer, seeks disposal of this petition with direction to police officials to provide protection to the petitioners. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of along with listed application, by directing the concerned police officials to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
